name: Messyginger0804
css: .mg-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0d0d0d; } .mg-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, #3a0a0a 0%, #0d0d0d 70%); animation: mg-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } @keyframes mg-pulse { from { opacity: 0.7; } to { opacity: 1; } } .mg-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .mg-title { font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: clamp(14px, 4vw, 28px); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ff4500; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff4500, 0 0 20px #ff6a00, 0 0 40px #ff4500; animation: mg-flicker 2.5s infinite; } @keyframes mg-flicker { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff4500, 0 0 20px #ff6a00, 0 0 40px #ff4500; } 45% { opacity: 0.9; text-shadow: 0 0 4px #ff4500, 0 0 10px #ff6a00; } 50% { opacity: 0.6; text-shadow: none; } 55% { opacity: 0.9; text-shadow: 0 0 4px #ff4500, 0 0 10px #ff6a00; } } .mg-dots { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .mg-dots span { display: block; width: clamp(6px, 1.5vw, 10px); height: clamp(6px, 1.5vw, 10px); border-radius: 50%; background: #ff4500; animation: mg-bounce 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #ff4500; } .mg-dots span:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0s; } .mg-dots span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; } .mg-dots span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; } .mg-dots span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.45s; } .mg-dots span:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.6s; } @keyframes mg-bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: translateY(-8px); opacity: 0.5; } }
